item.title: Govt to introduce IT and digital skills in religious schools, says Anwar
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
BUKIT MERTAJAM, March 7 — The government will kick off a training programme to provide early exposure to info...
Matched: breaking(+3), ministry(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Balance needed in anti-corruption probes, says Nurul Izzah
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The PKR deputy president says investigative practices must meet higher standards of fairness and privacy.
Matched: law(+3), parliament(+2), corruption(+3), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Anwar warns of wealthy elites trying to influence world media, local politics
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The prime minister says Malaysians must remain vigilant against foreign schemes and conspiracies.
Matched: law(+3), ministry(+2), corruption(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Saifuddin Nasution: 1,050 certified Quran copies cleared for printing and distribution nationwide

Matched: policy(+3), law(+3), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Isa files review to set aside corruption conviction
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Among the grounds for the former Felda chairman's review is an alleged breach of natural justice.
Matched: law(+3), corruption(+3), court(+2), ai(+3), breach(+3)

item.title: Anwar: Islamic State-linked extremist activity under control, but Malaysia must stay vigilant
item.description:

item.title: Start paying Sabah its due, Putrajaya urged
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Parti Gagasan Rakyat Sabah Youth says part payments can be made while negotiations continue to determine the actual amount of net tax revenue owed to the state.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Just DAP theatre, says PAS man on move to probe MACC
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Ahmad Fadhli Shaari says he has no problem with a royal commission of inquiry being formed. 'But I don’t think DAP is qualified to champion it.'
Matched: corruption(+3), war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: 4 M-League players suspended 12 months after CAS decision, says MFL
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
They are among the seven who were sanctioned by Fifa for falsifying naturalisation and eligibility documents to represent Malaysia.
Matched: court(+2), war(+3), sanctions(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Kiandee and Mas Ermieyati confirm show-cause letters from Bersatu disciplinary board

item.title: Set a fixed 8-year period for election seat reviews, says MP
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Wilfred Madius Tangau says the constitution should be amended, to help avoid confusion about when such reviews can be carried out.
Matched: law(+3), parliament(+2), election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Ensure fair Sarawak seat redelineation, EC chairman told
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Civil society groups say an alleged seat map shows 17 new constituencies favouring GPS, raising concerns over impartiality and equal representation.
Matched: law(+3), parliament(+2), election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Anwar stops by Penang Hospital to visit ‘old friend’ and PAS spiritual leader Hashim Jasin

Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)

item.title: Chinese voters no longer loyal to any party, says MCA sec-gen
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Chong Sin Woon says last year’s Sabah election showed voters will shift support if parties fail to deliver on promises.
Matched: war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Cops need more time to complete terrorism ideology probe, says minister
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Saifuddin Nasution Ismail says the process cannot be completed within just two or three days, even if the suspects involved are minors.
Matched: court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Saifuddin Nasution: Police require longer investigation for six suspects, including three minors, linked to Daesh
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)

item.title: Sarawak PAS eyes Beting Maro, 3 other seats in upcoming state polls
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
State commissioner Arifiriazul Paijo says the party is open to collaboration with PBDS and fielding non-Muslim candidates through its supporters' wing.
Matched: breaking(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: KJ met me ‘several times’ about return, says Zahid
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Ahmad Zahid Hamidi says there has been a 'very encouraging response' to the Rumah Bangsa initiative for former members to return.
Matched: parliament(+2), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Govt approves plan to evacuate Malaysians from high-risk Middle East areas, says Mohamad Hassan
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)

Source: Free Malaysia Today

item.title: Council officer beaten up by sellers of contraband cigarettes
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Police say one person has been arrested after the Sandakan enforcement officer was set upon while on patrol at the market area.
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: MA63 technical panel meets on education, health matters
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Decisions taken will be presented at a high-level meeting to be chaired by the prime minister in May or June, says deputy prime minister Fadillah Yusof.
Matched: parliament(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Anwar visits ailing PAS spiritual leader Hashim in hospital
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Hashim Jasin, 87, was transferred to the Penang Hospital on Feb 18 to undergo a stent procedure.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)
